author: AllenX95
description: Embeds MiMo-Code CLI Agent as an AI collaborator in your vault. Your vault becomes the working directory, giving MiMo-Code capabilities for file reads and writes, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: AllenX95
manifest.description: Embeds MiMo-Code CLI Agent as an AI collaborator in your vault. Your vault becomes the working directory, giving MiMo-Code capabilities for file reads and writes, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows.
manifest.name: Sidebar MiMo-Code

name: Sidebar MiMo-Code

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description:
## Sidebar MiMo-Code 1.0.5

- Refresh sidebar UI with Xiaomi orange pixel robot branding and tighter controls.
- Remove chat empty-state copy.
- Add bilingual README.

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description:
## 1.0.4
- Split chat tab, turn submission, stream projection, and render scheduling into focused modules.
- Remove the old Task-series SubagentManager path while preserving provider lifecycle compatibility.
- Add integration and unit coverage for chat turn submission, subagent projection, render scheduling, and controller side effects.
- Bump plugin metadata and compatibility table to 1.0.4.

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- release: 1.0.3 architecture updates

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AllenX95/sidebar-mimocode/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Replaced the legacy YOLO/Safe choices with MiMo-Code native Build and Plan modes.
- Migrates existing YOLO, Normal, and Safe selections to Build while preserving Plan.
- Added validated custom MiMo-Code permission rules with ask, allow, and deny actions.
- Updated runtime launch configuration, settings UI, tests, and documentation.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AllenX95/sidebar-mimocode/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Removed the stale Bun lockfile so npm is the single package manager.
- Resolved Obsidian automated review warnings while retaining compatibility with Obsidian 1.7.2.
- Updated Hono to 4.12.26 to address current security advisories.
- Added compatibility tests for destructive confirmation buttons.

releases.author: AllenX95
releases.description: here's v1.0.0 of the sidebar-mimocode plugin for Obisdiian
